examples.eng: He has a good command of German.
She commanded us to leave.
He has complete command of his emotions.
Shoot when I give the command.
The hill commands a good view.
Your command is taken off.
When I give the command, fire!
examples.ru: Как только я отдам приказ, стреляйте!

examples.eng: He bellowed a command to his men.
He commands a platoon of 60.
examples.ru: Он командует взводом из шестидесяти солдат.

examples.eng: He felt fully in command of the situation.
examples.ru: Он чувствовал, что полностью владеет обстановкой.

examples.eng: National Command authority
The general commanded a huge army.
It was in the nature of a command.
He finally felt in command of his life.
examples.ru: Наконец-то он почувствовал, что сам управляет своей жизнью.

examples.eng: He commands the 4th Battalion.
The mountain commands the plain.
This speaker commands a high fee.
We are expected to obey his commands.
Colonel ordered the command to halt.
The commands he held under the Crown.
examples.ru: Воинские посты, которые он занимал в Британской империи.

examples.eng: She shouted out commands to the crew.
examples.ru: Она выкрикивала команды экипажу. / Она громко командовала экипажем.

examples.eng: The system recognizes voice commands.
Suddenly the word of command is given.
Disable this command on your computer.
The colonel ordered the command to halt.
Who is the officer in command of the unit?
We had no choice but to do as they commanded.
examples.ru: Нам ничего не оставалось делать, кроме как им подчиниться.

examples.eng: He immediately took command of the situation.
examples.ru: Он немедленно установил контроль над ситуацией.

examples.eng: The whole army is under the general's command.
examples.ru: Вся армия находится под командованием генерала.

examples.eng: He commands the 4th Battalion of the Scots Guard.
